mapper.select: SELECT id_member::text, st_member, st_name, st_email, st_level, COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') AS yn_use, dt_insert::text AS inserted_at, dt_update::text AS updated_at FROM t_member WHERE COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N' ORDER BY CAST(id_member AS BIGINT) ASC

SELECT id_member::text, st_member, st_name, st_email, st_level, COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') AS yn_use, dt_insert::text AS inserted_at, dt_update::text AS updated_at FROM t_member WHERE id_member::text = #{idMember} AND COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N'

SELECT id_member::text, st_member, st_name, st_email, st_level, COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') AS yn_use, dt_insert::text AS inserted_at, dt_update::text AS updated_at FROM t_member WHERE st_member = #{memberId} AND COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N'

SELECT id_member::text, st_member, st_name, st_email, st_level, COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') AS yn_use, dt_insert::text AS inserted_at, dt_update::text AS updated_at FROM t_member WHERE st_member = #{memberId} AND st_password = #{password} AND COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') = 'Y'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(id_member AS BIGINT)), 0) + 1 FROM t_member
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_member ( id_member, st_member, st_password, st_name, st_email, st_level, yn_use, id_insert, dt_insert ) VALUES ( CAST(#{idMember} AS NUMERIC), #{memberId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{level}, #{ynUse}, CAST(#{idMember} AS NUMERIC), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_member SET st_member = #{memberId},
st_password = #{password},
st_name = #{name}, st_email = #{email}, st_level = #{level}, yn_use = #{ynUse}, id_update = CAST(#{idMember} AS NUMERIC), dt_update = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id_member::text = #{idMember} AND COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N'
UPDATE t_member SET yn_use = 'N', id_update = CAST(#{idMember} AS NUMERIC), dt_update = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id_member::text = #{idMember}
